hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire for clarity, seeking to distill beauty and meaning from fleeting moments through meticulous observation and selection.
